auth.label: Webhook Token
auth.description: Paste the token path segment from the Feishu webhook URL. The full webhook URL is also accepted. Create a custom bot from https://open.feishu.cn/document/client-docs/bot-v3/add-custom-bot.

extraFields.label: Signing Secret
extraFields.placeholder: Optional secret from Feishu signature verification
extraFields.description: Optional signing secret when signature verification is enabled for the bot. Copy it from the Feishu bot security settings.

actions.name: send_image_message
actions.description: Send an image message through the Feishu/Lark custom bot webhook.

imageKey.description: The Feishu image_key obtained from the image upload API.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a Feishu image message.

code.description: The Feishu response code. 0 means success.

statusCode.description: The legacy response code returned for backward compatibility.

statusMessage.description: The legacy response message returned for backward compatibility.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Feishu custom bot send result.

actions.name: send_interactive_message
actions.description: Send an interactive card message through the Feishu/Lark custom bot webhook.

card.description: The Feishu interactive card payload sent as the top-level card object.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a Feishu interactive card message.

code.description: The Feishu response code. 0 means success.

statusCode.description: The legacy response code returned for backward compatibility.

statusMessage.description: The legacy response message returned for backward compatibility.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Feishu custom bot send result.

actions.name: send_post_message
actions.description: Send a post rich-text message through the Feishu/Lark custom bot webhook.

items.description: One paragraph of Feishu rich-text tag objects.

content.description: The rich-text paragraphs grouped by line.

zh_cn.description: One language block inside the Feishu post payload.

items.description: One paragraph of Feishu rich-text tag objects.

content.description: The rich-text paragraphs grouped by line.

en_us.description: One language block inside the Feishu post payload.

post.description: The Feishu post payload sent as content.post. Include at least one of zh_cn or en_us.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a Feishu post rich-text message.

code.description: The Feishu response code. 0 means success.

statusCode.description: The legacy response code returned for backward compatibility.

statusMessage.description: The legacy response message returned for backward compatibility.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Feishu custom bot send result.

actions.name: send_share_chat_message
actions.description: Send a shared-chat card through the Feishu/Lark custom bot webhook.

shareChatId.description: The Feishu chat ID used in the share_chat message payload.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a Feishu shared-chat message.

code.description: The Feishu response code. 0 means success.

statusCode.description: The legacy response code returned for backward compatibility.

statusMessage.description: The legacy response message returned for backward compatibility.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Feishu custom bot send result.

actions.name: send_text_message
actions.description: Send a text message through the Feishu/Lark custom bot webhook.

text.description: The text message content. You can include Feishu <at ...> tags inline.

inputSchema.description: Input for sending a Feishu text message.

code.description: The Feishu response code. 0 means success.

statusCode.description: The legacy response code returned for backward compatibility.

statusMessage.description: The legacy response message returned for backward compatibility.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Feishu custom bot send result.
